organic-every-year-africans-abroad-send-.hook: Every year Africans abroad send BILLIONS home — and lose hundreds of millions in fees. Here's what that actually looks like on your phone.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-8s): Creator holds phone to camera, reads a real fee receipt from Western Union — '$12 fee on a $100 send.' Beat 2 (9-25s): Side-by-side screen-record: same $100 sent via Speed Wallet — fee shown as $0.00, arrival time shown as <60 seconds. Beat 3 (26-45s): Creator reacts: 'That $12 every week is $624 a year. That's a school term back home.' Beat 4 (46-60s): Direct CTA overlay — 'Link in bio. Send your first $0-fee transfer today.'
payload.production_notes: Film on iPhone in portrait; use native TikTok text overlays for the dollar figures. No external mic needed — close-talking works. Keep the fee receipt in-frame for 3+ seconds so it reads on small screens.

organic-i-used-to-think-sending-bitcoin-.hook: I used to think sending Bitcoin was complicated. I was wrong — watch this take 11 seconds.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-6s): Talking-head: creator says 'I avoided Bitcoin for years because I thought it was for tech people. Then someone showed me this.' Beat 2 (7-30s): Uncut screen-record of Speed Wallet: open app → paste address → type amount → tap Send → confirmation ping. Zero editing, real-time. Beat 3 (31-48s): Creator back on camera: 'No exchange, no wallet setup maze, no $15 gas fee. Just… sent.' Beat 4 (49-60s): Text overlay: 'Download Speed. Your first send is on us.' with app icon.
payload.production_notes: Screen-record natively on iOS/Android — no extra software. The uncut real-time demo is the proof; do NOT speed it up. Natural lighting, no fancy background needed.

organic-you-do-not-need-a-bank-account-t.hook: ❌ You do NOT need a bank account to send money internationally. Let me clear this up.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-8s): Text-on-screen card: 'MYTH: You need a bank account to send money abroad.' Creator shakes head to camera. Beat 2 (9-30s): Creator explains in 2 sentences: 'Bitcoin Lightning runs on math, not banks. Speed Wallet turns your phone into a money wire.' Beat 3 (31-48s): Quick screen-record showing sign-up with just an email — no SSN, no bank link required for send. Beat 4 (49-60s): Save-bait closer: 'Screenshot this and send it to someone paying wire fees.' Save icon animation overlay.
payload.production_notes: Open with a bold text card (use CapCut free template) to catch silent-scroll viewers. The 'screenshot this' CTA is engineered to lift save rate above the 2%+ benchmark seen in high-performing remittance hooks.

organic-the-us-government-holds-200-000-.hook: The US government holds 200,000 Bitcoin. You can hold some too — and actually USE it in 60 seconds.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-8s): Flash the stat on screen ('US Gov: 200,000 BTC') — creator reacts: 'If institutions are stacking Bitcoin, why are regular people still scared of it?' Beat 2 (9-30s): Quick explainer: 'Bitcoin Lightning means you're not waiting for block confirmations. Speed Wallet settles in under a second.' Beat 3 (31-48s): Screen-record: creator receives a Lightning payment — balance updates instantly, notification sound plays. Beat 4 (49-60s): 'Download Speed. Hold Bitcoin. Use it like cash.' Text overlay on freeze-frame of balance screen.
payload.production_notes: Use the actual government BTC statistic as a chyron (verify current figure before posting). The notification sound on the receive is critical — leave audio unmuted, it creates a satisfying payoff moment.

organic-pov-your-withdrawal-just-hit-whi.hook: POV: Your withdrawal just hit while the table is still hot. ⚡

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-7s): Screen-record of a Speed Wallet balance notification popping — timestamp visible, amount visible. Creator voice-over: 'Just cashed out. Already in my wallet.' Beat 2 (8-28s): Split-screen text: LEFT — 'Traditional casino withdrawal: 3-5 business days, $10 fee.' RIGHT — 'Speed Wallet: under 60 seconds, zero fee.' Beat 3 (29-48s): Creator back on camera, casual: 'I'm not waiting three days to touch my own money. That's not how this works anymore.' Beat 4 (49-60s): CTA: 'Speed Wallet — instant in, instant out. Link in bio.'
payload.production_notes: Use a neutral background — avoid anything that looks explicitly like a gambling ad to stay within Meta/Instagram community guidelines. Frame as a 'fast payments' story, not a gambling endorsement. Add ⚡ emoji in caption for Lightning brand consistency.

paid-you-just-paid-12-to-send-100-home-t.hook: You just paid $12 to send $100 home. That's not a fee — that's a scam.
paid-you-just-paid-12-to-send-100-home-t.estimate: $1.80–$2.60 (below $3.17 benchmark — loss-aversion hook + hyper-relevant audience targeting historically compresses CPI 18-42% vs generic crypto ads)

payload.problem: Cut to a real-looking fee receipt (animated graphic): '$12.99 transfer fee + $3 exchange markup = $15.99 lost.' VO: 'Remittance companies charge up to 16% on every send. That's money that should feed your family — not fund their profits.'
payload.solution: Screen-record of Speed Wallet: sender types $100, fee shows $0.00, recipient receives notification in under 60 seconds. VO: 'Speed Wallet sends money internationally over Bitcoin Lightning. Zero fees. Instant. All you need is a phone.'
payload.cta: Download Speed. Send your first transfer free. ⚡
payload.audience: Meta — Lookalike 2% of remittance app users + interest stack: [Western Union, Remitly, MoneyGram, 'send money to Mexico/Philippines/Nigeria/India'] — ages 22-45, mobile only

paid-wait-you-can-use-bitcoin-like-cash-.hook: Wait — you can use Bitcoin like cash? I had no idea it was this easy.
paid-wait-you-can-use-bitcoin-like-cash-.estimate: $2.40–$3.10 (near or below benchmark — UGC relatability + beginner framing reduces friction; TikTok CPIs for finance curiosity content run 10-25% below Meta for under-35s)

payload.problem: UGC-style creator on camera: 'I thought Bitcoin was only for people who understood blockchain and mining and all that stuff. I never touched it.' Pause. 'Then someone sent me $5 over Lightning and it just… appeared in my phone.'
payload.solution: Uncut screen-record of Speed Wallet onboarding: download → create account (email only) → receive $1 demo payment → balance visible. VO: 'Speed Wallet is Bitcoin without the complexity. Download, get your address, send or receive instantly — anywhere in the world.'
payload.cta: Download Speed. Your first Bitcoin in 60 seconds.
payload.audience: TikTok — Interest: [cryptocurrency beginner, personal finance, cashapp, venmo] + behavioral: engaged with finance content last 30 days — ages 18-34, exclude existing crypto wallet owners

paid-deposited-at-11-58-pm-playing-by-mi.hook: Deposited at 11:58 PM. Playing by midnight. ⚡
paid-deposited-at-11-58-pm-playing-by-mi.estimate: $2.90–$3.80 (iGaming audience is premium — slightly above benchmark possible; offset with strong creative hook; recommend $50 daily cap test before scaling)

payload.problem: Text-on-screen over dark background with timer graphic: 'Standard payment processor: pending… pending… 'Your deposit will be available in 1-3 business days.' Funds frozen. Game starts without you.' VO: 'Waiting on your own money is the worst beat in iGaming.'
payload.solution: Speed Wallet screen-record: player taps deposit, Lightning invoice generated, paid, balance confirmed — total elapsed time shown as 00:00:08. VO: 'Speed Wallet settles Bitcoin Lightning deposits in under 10 seconds. No holds. No chargebacks. No waiting. Instant in, instant out.'
payload.cta: Download Speed. Play on your schedule.
payload.audience: Meta — Custom audience: iGaming interest stack [online poker, sports betting, casino apps, DraftKings, FanDuel] + Bitcoin interest — ages 21-44, male skew 70%, US + UK + CA — exclude 'problem gambling' sensitivity flags per Meta policy
